skip_reason: Services unavailable (backend and frontend not running); static-only audit performed

escalations.title: Handlebars.js JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion
Protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution during Deserialization

p1_findings.title: Canonical Specs Describe an Unbuilt Product
p1_findings.detail: FR-001–FR-069 describe a different product (Feature Requests/Bug Reports/Dev Cycles/SQLite). Zero implementation traces exist. The built product is an in-memory work-item routing engine.
p1_findings.recommendation: Archive dev-workflow-platform.md as superseded or add a 'Future Scope' header. Write a spec for the actual built system.

p1_findings.title: Traceability Enforcer Single-Plan Blind Spot
p1_findings.detail: Enforcer auto-selects only the most-recently-modified requirements.md. Reports PASSED while 57 requirements across 3 plans have zero traces (orchestrated-dev-cycles: 17 failures, dev-cycle-traceability: 20 failures, image-upload: 20 failures).
p1_findings.recommendation: Add --all-plans mode to enforcer; let inspector.config.yml mark plans as completed to exclude them.

p2_findings.title: Route Handlers Bypass Service Layer
p2_findings.detail: All three route files import directly from workItemStore, violating the 'no direct DB calls from route handlers' architecture rule. Business logic (filtering, pagination, state transitions) lives in route handlers.
p2_findings.recommendation: Extract store calls into workItemService.ts. Route handlers should only parse request, call service, format response.

p2_findings.title: dependency-linking Delta References Stale portal/ Paths
p2_findings.detail: Implementation delta table references portal/Backend/ and portal/Frontend/ paths. Project migrated to Source/. FR-dependency-frontend-tests is incorrectly marked missing — tests exist at Source/Frontend/tests/components/.
p2_findings.recommendation: Update delta to Source/ paths. Mark FR-dependency-frontend-tests as Done.

p2_findings.title: Duplicate Test Files for Same Components
p2_findings.detail: Two test files cover the same components. Creates maintenance burden, contradictory expectations, and inflated test count.
p2_findings.recommendation: Consolidate to tests/pages/ canonical location. Merge non-overlapping cases, delete top-level duplicates.

p2_findings.title: path-to-regexp ReDoS
p2_findings.detail: ReDoS via multiple route parameters causes exponential regex backtracking. DoS vector on routing layer.

p2_findings.title: Picomatch ReDoS via Extglob Quantifiers
p2_findings.detail: ReDoS via extglob quantifier patterns in glob matching.

p3_findings.title: eslint-disable Without Justification
p3_findings.recommendation: Add inline comments explaining why react-hooks/exhaustive-deps is intentionally suppressed.

p3_findings.title: WorkItemDetailPage.tsx at 426 Lines — Refactor Candidate
p3_findings.recommendation: Extract WorkflowActionsPanel, ChangeHistoryTimeline, AssessmentRecordsList as focused components.

p3_findings.title: FR ID Namespace Has No Authority Registry
p3_findings.detail: Seven distinct FR prefixes with no mapping table. Enforcer pattern FR-\d+ misses FR-WF-XXX and FR-dependency-XXX.
p3_findings.recommendation: Add FR namespace registry to CLAUDE.md. Update enforcer pattern.

p3_findings.title: Vite Path Traversal in Optimised Deps .map Handling
esbuild CORS Bypass in Dev Server
Vitest Chain Vulnerabilities (depends on vulnerable vite/vite-node)
React + react-router-dom 1 major behind
p3_findings.recommendation: Upgrade to React 19.x, react-router-dom 7.x in Phase 2

p3_findings.title: OpenTelemetry packages 168+ minors behind in portal/Backend

cross_references.root_cause: Spec governance gap — multiple plans accumulated with no tracking of which are active vs future-scope
cross_references.fix: Single fix: (1) Mark Specifications/dev-workflow-platform.md as future-scope, (2) add --all-plans mode to enforcer, (3) add FR namespace registry. All three findings resolved by this governance cleanup.

cross_references.root_cause: Service layer not yet extracted from route handlers
cross_references.fix: Create Source/Backend/src/services/workItemService.ts, migrate store calls from workItems.ts, workflow.ts, intake.ts.

cross_references.root_cause: Frontend test organisation not standardised after migration
cross_references.fix: Consolidate test files under tests/pages/, update dependency-linking delta to reflect Source/ paths.

cross_references.root_cause: Transitive dependency staleness in platform/orchestrator and portal stack
cross_references.fix: Single npm update run in platform/orchestrator fixes both protobufjs and path-to-regexp.
